ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "density_per_km2" INTEGER /* Population density of the city per square kilometer */,
  "world_density_rank" INTEGER /* World density rank of the city */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the city data was last updated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the population and area data */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Level of urbanization (e.g., highly urbanized, semi-urbanized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "government_form" TEXT /* Form of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "geospatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city center */,
  "boundary_polygon" TEXT /* Boundary polygon in WKT format */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the geospatial data was last updated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the geospatial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geospatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city in the given year */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers in the given year */,
  "density_per_km2" INTEGER /* Population density of the city per square kilometer in the given year */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate for the given year */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Level of urbanization for the given year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was last updated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, planner, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report data was last updated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., public transport, healthcare) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., infrastructure, social) */,
  "feature_score" REAL /* Numerical score of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the feature data was last updated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the feature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_features_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "city_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first city in the relation */,
  "city_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second city in the relation */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of the relation (e.g., sister city, economic partner) */,
  "relation_description" TEXT /* Description of the relation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the relation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the relation ended (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the relation data was last updated */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the relation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_relations_city_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("city_id_1") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_relations_city_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("city_id_2") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
